title: DuckTapeKiller/dive
summary: Dive is a secure, local-first desktop client for Ollama and Pi agentic AI. Features an ultra-compact offline RAG engine for indexing massive book libraries, MCP tool integration, sandboxed custom skills, PDF extraction, and macOS daemon support.

title: Enntity/lloom
summary: Local-first gateway for running and routing open model backends through OpenAI and Anthropic-compatible APIs.

title: MatthewTracy/yagami
summary: Local-first AI router with PHI-aware routing, tool use, and cross-session memory

title: JWhite212/context-recall
summary: macOS daemon that auto-detects Teams meetings, transcribes locally with faster-whisper, and produces structured summaries via Local Modals or Claude API

title: tobocop2/lilbee
summary: The whole local AI stack in one executable: it runs and manages local AI models across every GPU, and it's a search engine you can talk to, with cited answers from your files, code, and the web. MCP server for coding agents, web crawler, TUI, CLI, REST API, Python library. No Ollama or LM Studio needed, works with both.

title: bug-ops/zeph
summary: A memory-first AI agent that remembers why decisions were made — not just the last message. Runs local (Ollama), cloud (Claude · OpenAI · Gemini), or decentralized TEE. Graph memory, self-learning skills, multi-model routing, sandboxed tools. MCP · ACP · A2A. One Rust binary.

title: wlsdks/muse-agent
summary: Building a personal AI that learns how you live and work, then gets better at knowing when and how to help. Local-first, any model.

title: rohithkandula19/Ronin
summary: Masterless, terminal-native coding agent (Claude Code-style: reads, edits, runs code) for Claude, Gemini, Cerebras, Groq, and Ollama. Provider-agnostic with evals, memory, security hardening, 200+ plugins, and MCP. MIT.

title: kstevica/captain-claw
summary: Self-hosted framework for orchestrating fleets of specialist AI agents — ensemble reasoning and a full agentic coding pipeline, model-agnostic and local-friendly.

title: AronMav/opex
summary: Self-hosted AI agent gateway built like infrastructure, not a chat app. A Rust core runs agents, tools, memory, cron, secrets. Agents live in Telegram / Discord / Slack / Matrix / WhatsApp; personas in Markdown, tools in YAML, hot-reloaded. Encrypted vault, DNS-level SSRF guard, sandboxed code exec.

title: r3dbars/nightshift
summary: Put your idle AI hardware to work while you sleep. Overnight, your machines scan the repo, draft safe work, and hand you a ranked morning brief. Drafts, not deploys. Local-first, MIT.

title: eliautobot/obsync
summary: Continuously turn folders from any computer into organized Obsidian Markdown.

title: maz557/coding-agent-free
summary: Interactive AI coding agent using free OpenRouter models with real tool calling

title: ssrjkk/raven
summary: Self-hosted corporate AI assistant: 12 messengers, RAG, monitors, coding tools, RBAC. Python/TS/Go/Rust stack. Privacy-first & modular.

title: browseros-ai/BrowserOS
summary: 🌐 The open-source Agentic browser; alternative to ChatGPT Atlas, Perplexity Comet, Dia.

title: netresearch/t3x-nr-llm
summary: The shared AI foundation for TYPO3 — one LLM setup for every extension on your site

title: ariigrangetto/loomy
summary: 💇🏻‍♀️A web-based application for automating shifts and professional schedule control.

title: nuvocode/verba
summary: Learn a language by talking to an AI that never gets bored, never judges, and — if you want — never touches the internet.

title: Zanmmi/micro-agent-cli
summary: 🏆 Ultralight AI Coding Agent 2026 — Blazing CLI, Tiny Codebase, Full Power Free

title: Planet9V/OXOT-Website-JULY2026
summary: Bilingual (NL/EN) OXOT website — Dutch OT cybersecurity. Six cited EU framework guides (NIS2, CRA, AI Act, Machinery Regulation, IEC 62443, TS 50701), a Cyber Digital Twin, an admin CMS, and an AI visitor agent. Next.js + Postgres/pgvector + Ollama, fully Dockerized.
